title: anthosachne kingiana
intro: Anthosachne kingiana, also known as the woolly grass or Australian woolly grass, is a species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its soft, woolly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Consuming Anthosachne kingiana has been reported to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
